name: Android Codespaces Env
postCreateCommand: sudo mkdir -p /usr/local/share/android-sdk/cmdline-tools && sudo chown -R vscode:vscode /usr/local/share/android-sdk && wget -q https://dl.google.com/android/repository/commandlinetools-linux-11076708_latest.zip -O /tmp/cmdline-tools.zip && unzip -q /tmp/cmdline-tools.zip -d /usr/local/share/android-sdk/cmdline-tools && mv /usr/local/share/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/cmdline-tools /usr/local/share/android-sdk/cmdline-tools/latest && rm /tmp/cmdline-tools.zip && yes | sdkmanager --licenses && sdkmanager "platform-tools" "platforms;android-34" "build-tools;34.0.0"
